center.name: 里韋拉爾塔
center.summary: 里韋拉爾塔是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Masked antpitta，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Most records are from near the town of Riberalta in northern Beni on the Pando border. It apparently once occupied a larger area. It inhabits secondary forest filled with dense tangled vegetation as around the edges of open areas; it apparently favors muddy areas
